The church maintains a consistent rhythm of fellowship with weekly Tuesday coffee circles, monthly community meals, and evening Bible study and prayer meetings.

name: Vallhamrakyrkan

The church offers distinctive RPG (fellowship groups) alongside traditional worship services, youth ministry, and operates their own preschool called Prästkragens förskola.
